Data Providers & Attribution

TCA-IRR-APP aggregates data from multiple trusted sources. We are committed to transparency and compliance with all data provider terms of service.

Government & Regulatory

  • • SEC EDGAR - U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
  • • FDA Orange Book - Food and Drug Administration
  • • USPTO PatentsView - U.S. Patent and Trademark Office
  • • ClinicalTrials.gov - National Library of Medicine

Economic & Financial

  • • FRED - Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
  • • BEA - Bureau of Economic Analysis
  • • BLS - Bureau of Labor Statistics
  • • World Bank Open Data

Research & Technology

  • • PubMed - National Center for Biotechnology Information
  • • GitHub - Microsoft Corporation
  • • Hugging Face - AI Model Repository
  • • arXiv - Cornell University

Data usage is subject to each provider's terms of service and rate limits.

Rate Limited
Cached
Compliant
